name: CDC Federal Credit Union
description_short: CDC Federal Credit Union is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 3.2/5 with 64 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
CDC Federal Credit Union is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. Carrying a 3.2/5.0 Google rating from 64 reviews, CDC Federal Credit Union has an mixed reputation among consumers in the Atlanta area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit union, federal credit union, financial planner, CDC Federal Credit Union provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. CDC Federal Credit Union operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering CDC Federal Credit Union should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
